name: minifycss
description:
Minify CSS files using the cssnano minification library.
Minify files with command, with options to automatically minify on save and generate source maps.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Do not minify file on save
Minify previously minfied files (files with an existing .min.css file) on save
minifycss.minifyOnSave.description: Whether or not to automatically minify CSS files on save

minifycss.generateSourceMap.description: Whether or not to generate a source map for the minified CSS file

minifycss.successNotificationStatusBar.description: Whether or not to show a notification in the status bar on successful minification

minifycss.successNotificationInformation.description: Whether or not to show a an information message on successful minification

markdownEnumDescriptions: Default preset — safe optimisations suitable for most projects
Advanced preset — more aggressive optimisations, may change some CSS behaviour
Lite preset (cssnano-preset-lite v5, not officially compatible with cssnano v8 — use with caution)
minifycss.preset.description: The cssnano preset to use when minifying
